title: Name
description: Represents customers, suppliers, employees, and other contacts or entities interacted with by the business. Internal Name: Name (file_num: 10).

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for the Name record.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the Name record was modified.

Code.description: The unique code used to identify this Name record (customer, supplier, etc.). Indexed.

Name.description: The full name of the person or organisation. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Contact.description: The primary contact person's name for this entity. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Position.description: The job title or position of the primary contact person. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Address1.description: First line of the mailing/postal address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Address2.description: Second line of the mailing/postal address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Address3.description: Third line of the mailing/postal address (often Suburb). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Address4.description: Fourth line of the mailing/postal address (often City/State/Region). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Delivery1.description: First line of the delivery/shipping address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Delivery2.description: Second line of the delivery/shipping address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Delivery3.description: Third line of the delivery/shipping address (often Suburb). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Delivery4.description: Fourth line of the delivery/shipping address (often City/State/Region). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Category1.description: User-defined category 1 for grouping and analysis. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Category2.description: User-defined category 2 for grouping and analysis. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Category3.description: User-defined category 3 for grouping and analysis. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Category4.description: User-defined category 4 for grouping and analysis. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

D90Plus.description: Aged receivables balance for invoices 90+ days overdue (based on manual ageing).

D60Plus.description: Aged receivables balance for invoices 60-89 days overdue (based on manual ageing).

D30Plus.description: Aged receivables balance for invoices 30-59 days overdue (based on manual ageing).

DCurrent.description: Current receivables balance (invoices not yet overdue based on manual ageing).

CCurrent.description: Current accounts payable balance (amount owed to this supplier).

DebtorTerms.description: Default payment terms granted to this debtor (positive N = days, negative N = Nth day of following month).

CreditorTerms.description: Default payment terms received from this creditor (positive N = days, negative N = Nth day of following month).

Bank.description: Customer's bank name or code (used for deposit slips). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

AccountName.description: The name on the bank account (customer's or supplier's). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

BankBranch.description: The customer's bank branch details. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TheirRef.description: The reference code used by this entity to identify your organisation. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Hold.description: If true, transactions for this Name are automatically put on hold. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

RecAccount.description: The default Accounts Receivable control account code for this debtor.

PayAccount.description: The default Accounts Payable control account code for this creditor.

Kind.description: Indicates the kind of Name record (e.g., template or normal). Indexed.

CreditLimit.description: The credit limit extended to this debtor (0 = unlimited). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Discount.description: Default percentage discount given to this customer. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Comment.description: General comments or notes about this Name record. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

enumDescriptions.2: Creditor (can receive purchase orders on credit)

Colour.description: A user-assigned colour index (0-7) for visual identification in lists. Labels are user-defined in preferences. (Mutable: conditionally)

Salesperson.description: The default salesperson code associated with this customer/debtor. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TaxCode.description: Overrides the default tax code for transactions with this Name.

SplitMode.description: Default auto-allocation mode used for transactions with this Name.

PostCode.description: Postal/Zip code for the mailing address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

State.description: State/Province/Region for the mailing address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

BankAccountNumber.description: The supplier's bank account number (used for electronic payments). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Currency.description: The default currency code for transactions with this Name (Gold only). Empty for base currency.

PaymentMethod.description: The default method used to pay this creditor. (Mutable: conditionally)

DBalance.description: Total debtor balance (sum of D90Plus, D60Plus, D30Plus, DCurrent).

DDI.description: Direct Dial-In number for the primary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

eMail.description: Email address for the primary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Mobile.description: Mobile phone number for the primary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

AfterHours.description: After-hours contact number for the primary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Contact2.description: The name of the secondary contact person. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Position2.description: The job title or position of the secondary contact person. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

DDI2.description: Direct Dial-In number for the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

eMail2.description: Email address for the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Mobile2.description: Mobile phone number for the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

AfterHours2.description: After-hours contact number for the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

WebURL.description: The website URL for the entity. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

ProductPricing.description: The default product pricing level (A-F) assigned to this customer. (Mutable: conditionally)

DateOfLastSale.description: The date of the last recorded sale (invoice or cash receipt) to this customer.

SplitAcct1.description: Account code (potentially including dept) for the first part of an auto-allocation split.

SplitAcct2.description: Account code (potentially including dept) for the second part (often remainder) of an auto-allocation split.

SplitPercent.description: The percentage to allocate to SplitAcct1 in an auto-allocation split.

SplitAmount.description: The fixed amount to allocate to SplitAcct1 in an auto-allocation split.

UserNum.description: A user-defined number field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

UserText.description: A user-defined text field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

CustPromptPaymentTerms.description: Default prompt payment terms offered TO this customer (days or day-of-month code). (Mutable: conditionally)

CustPromptPaymentDiscount.description: Default prompt payment discount percentage offered TO this customer. (Mutable: conditionally)

SuppPromptPaymentTerms.description: Default prompt payment terms offered BY this supplier (days or day-of-month code). (Mutable: conditionally)

SuppPromptPaymentDiscount.description: Default prompt payment discount percentage offered BY this supplier. (Mutable: conditionally)

LastPaymentMethod.description: The payment method code used in the last payment transaction involving this Name.

CreditCardNum.description: Customer's credit card number (store securely!). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

CreditCardExpiry.description: Customer's credit card expiry date (e.g., MMYY). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

CreditCardName.description: Name as it appears on the customer's credit card. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TaxNumber.description: The entity's tax identification number (e.g., GST#, VAT Reg No, ABN, EIN). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

DeliveryPostcode.description: Postal/Zip code for the delivery address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

DeliveryState.description: State/Province/Region for the delivery address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

AddressCountry.description: Country for the mailing/postal address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

DeliveryCountry.description: Country for the delivery/shipping address. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

ReceiptMethod.description: The default method this customer uses to pay. (Mutable: conditionally)

ABUID.description: Address Book Unique Identifier (macOS Address Book integration).

BankParticulars.description: Specific particulars to include on electronic payments to this supplier. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Flags.description: A bitmask field storing various boolean settings/attributes for the Name record (e.g., Requires Order Number).

Salutation.description: Salutation for the primary contact (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr.). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Salutation2.description: Salutation for the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Memo.description: Memo/notes associated with the primary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Memo2.description: Memo/notes associated with the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Role.description: Bitmask representing the role(s) assigned to the primary contact (defined in Preferences). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Role2.description: Bitmask representing the role(s) assigned to the secondary contact. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TaggedText.description: Stores key-value pairs for custom data, primarily accessed via scripting functions GetTaggedValue/SetTaggedValue. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

EInvoicingID.description: The unique identifier (e.g., ABN, NZBN, UEN) used for sending/receiving electronic invoices via PEPPOL network. (Mutable: freely, script-only)
